name: DVPJ
description: Developer of an online business management platform designed to manage the financials, stocks, and contacts of a company. The company's platform helps micro and small businesses in financial management, sales management, inventory management, invoicing, and billing, enabling entrepreneurs to focus on expanding their businesses and maximizing their profits.

name: Intercom
description: Developer of a conversational relationship platform designed to create personal connections with customers. The company's platform helps businesses to browse their customers, view their social profiles, and reach out to them, enabling businesses to track and filter customer data and grow their business.

name: LoveWithFood
description: Provider of an online food subscription platform designed to provide healthier food to consumers. The company's online food subscription platform offers all-natural, organic or gluten-free snacks with no cancellation fee and free home delivery, enabling users to try out new snacks every month before committing to full-size products, thereby saving time and money.

name: Shoppable
description: Developer of a distributed shopping platform intended to reduce the marketing budget. The company's platform revolutionizes affiliate marketing, integrates shopping experiences into paid search, display and social media and turnkey embeddable commerce options are available for websites, allows maximum flexibility on desktop and mobile, and holds multiple patents for universal checkout, enabling advertisers, retailers and publishers to create shoppable sites, content, advertisements, mobile applications and other commerce experiences.

name: Talkdesk
description: Developer of cloud-based call center software designed to help growing businesses improve customer satisfaction while reducing costs. The company's platform uses IVR, ACD, and skills-based routing technology that seamlessly integrates ITSM and CSM service desks, enabling businesses to communicate with their customers and manage the entire call center operations using the web.

name: Cadee
description: Operator of a social community for golfers. The company has developed an online platform through which golfers can discover new courses, share and compare golf scores, track golf activities of other members and calculate golf statistics.

name: Forrst
description: Provider of online community for website developers and designers. The company offers its community to help themselves and others get better at their craft by providing critiques and sharing their knowledge to build applications and websites.

name: Import2
description: Provider of team communication tool. The company's tool brings all business information from various cloud services together in one place for collaboration on your team documents, tasks and contacts.

name: Contactually
description: Provider of a cloud-based intelligent customer relationship management (CRM) platform intended to offer relationship management and engagement services to service-oriented professionals. The company's platform facilitates personal engagement at scale, resulting in more leads, referrals and increased business, enabling estate professionals and brokers to maximize agent adoption, review key performance metrics and communicate effectively with their agents.

name: Farmeron
description: Provider of a cloud-based farm business management and analytics platform. The company provides a platform designed to help dairy and cattle producers manage their business operations while assisting in decision making process.

name: Abodigy
description: Provider of a custom calendar platform for homeowner's projects and house maintenance. The company provides tips, weekly reminders and home design, home maintenance and cleaning schedules to homeowners.

name: Tailored
description: Provider of a peer-to-peer boat rental platform intended to offer boats available to everyone. The company's platform provides real time customer service support and insurance coverage, both in the U.S. and internationally, enabling renters and boat owners to provide the best concierge services easily.

name: Fitocracy
description: Developer of a fitness based online gaming platform. The company's gaming platform imparts fitness by bringing the gaming reward system to workout routines. It enables users to track their workouts, earn points, unlock achievements and access fitness coach.

name: Beeem
description: Developer of mobile applications for picture sharing. The application developed by company allows users to caption the pictures. It's application lets users write over photos and turn them into stories.

name: SafeShepherd
description: Provider of services for people to protect their privacy. The company's website enables users to see, remove and protect their personal information from the Internet.
